security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be tampered with without sufficient validation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not sufficiently validate vote integrity.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate vote data integrity.
The actor can modify the vote message before submission.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust input validation and integrity checks for vote messages.

description: An attacker may alter the contents of a vote before it is processed by the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be submitted without verifiable authentication or authorization.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The lack of strong authentication makes it difficult to trace votes back to their origin.

assumptions: The system does not maintain a verifiable audit trail of votes.
The actor can submit votes anonymously or under a pseudonymous identity.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust logging, auditing, and non-repudiation mechanisms for all vote submissions.

description: An attacker may submit votes without being held accountable for their actions.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed due to insufficient access controls.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Vote data could be exposed during transmission or storage.

assumptions: The voting system does not use end-to-end encryption to protect vote data.
Vote data is stored in a database that is not properly secured.

mitigation.strategy: Implement end-to-end encryption for vote data and secure storage of vote records.

description: An attacker may gain access to sensitive vote data through various attack vectors.
